checks.label: Supabase auth + REST
checks.action: Set Supabase project URL and anon key before claiming cross-device account sync.

checks.label: OAuth redirect
checks.action: Set VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT_URL to the deployed app URL for Google OAuth and magic links.

checks.label: Free schedule source
checks.detail: TheSportsDB free route is available for schedule, score, event status and limited lineup/stat enrichment continuity
checks.action: Configured.

checks.label: Free feed CORS proxy
checks.action: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL so ESPN, TheSportsDB and worldcup26 can read back from static hosting without CORS failures.

checks.label: Lineups + injuries
checks.action: Configure API-Football to fetch fixture lineups, injuries and richer odds.

checks.label: Odds /盘口
checks.action: Configure API-Football odds or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY.

checks.label: Paid/free backup feed
checks.action: Add Football-Data.org as a backup fixture and score route if quota allows.

checks.label: Browser seal endpoint
checks.action: Deploy the seal API and point the browser build at its /seal endpoint; clients use POST /seal?async=1 and GET /jobs/:id.

checks.label: Upload token
checks.action: Require a bearer token before browser uploads can spend backend sealing resources.

checks.label: Public HTTPS app URL
checks.action: Set VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL to the deployed HTTPS app URL so proof/profile/share links are public.

checks.label: Public share image bucket
checks.action: Create a public Supabase Storage bucket for generated proof-card PNGs.

checks.label: Build base path
checks.action: Keep BASE_URL aligned with the deployed path so static assets resolve correctly.

checks.label: Public app root
checks.action: Deploy the final dist folder to the configured HTTPS URL.

checks.label: Published acceptance evidence
checks.action: Run bun run verify:acceptance before bun run build and deploy dist.

checks.label: Published logo asset
checks.action: Deploy static assets from dist/assets.

checks.label: Backend schema health
checks.action: Apply supabase.schema.sql and verify grants/RLS policies.

checks.label: Global leaderboard current user
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID to a synced user that appears in kickoff_leaderboard.

checks.label: Friend leaderboard current user
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID and KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE for a synced leaderboard row.

checks.label: Season leaderboard current user
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID and KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY for a synced leaderboard row.

checks.label: Public profile target row
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID to a synced public profile id.

checks.label: Public prediction target row
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID to a synced prediction capsule id.

checks.label: Public mode proof target row
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS to synced mode proof run ids.

checks.label: Public record share artifact target row
checks.action: Generate a record share card, upload it to Supabase Storage, and sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: Public mode share artifact target row
checks.action: Generate mode proof share cards, upload them to Supabase Storage, and sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: Public record share channel target row
checks.action: Open the X intent or native share for the record proof card, then sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: Public mode share channel target row
checks.action: Open the X intent or native share for every mode proof card, then sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: TheSportsDB season feed
checks.action: Configure VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or keep direct public feed access healthy for continuity.

checks.label: ESPN World Cup scoreboard
checks.action: Configure VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or keep direct public feed access healthy for continuity.

checks.label: Free public football feed continuity
checks.detail: TheSportsDB season feed:HTTP 429, World Cup payload missing · ESPN World Cup scoreboard:ok
checks.action: Keep TheSportsDB or ESPN reachable so schedule/score continuity does not depend on seed data.

checks.label: API-Football enrichment read-back
checks.action: Configure API-Football and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS to verify lineups, injuries and odds.

checks.label: Seal API production health
checks.action: Deploy the seal API and configure VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API.

checks.label: Seal API async endpoint contract
checks.action: Deploy the seal API with POST /seal?async=1, GET /jobs/:id, GET /verify?cid= and GET /proof/:cid.

checks.label: Record CID proof read-back
checks.action: Run a production one-click seal for one prediction capsule and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID plus KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_PAYLOAD_HASH.

checks.label: Mode CID proof read-back
checks.action: Run production one-click seals for every required tournament mode proof and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS plus KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASHES.

checks.label: Public profile link
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID to a synced Supabase profile id.

checks.label: Public prediction proof link
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID to a synced capsule id.

checks.label: Public mode proof link
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS to synced mode proof run ids.

checks.label: Public share image URL
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL to a Supabase Storage public PNG URL.

checks.label: Public mode share image URL
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL to a Supabase Storage public PNG URL for mode proof cards.
